title: Anthropic, Cursor backer Accel raises $5 billion for big AI bets
description: Accel, the venture capital firm that’s backed artificial intelligence companies including Anthropic, Cursor and Perplexity, has raised $5 billion in new funds to keep up its big bets in the age of increasingly valuable artificial intelligence startups. The firm will dedicate $4 billion to its fifth Leaders fund, focused on writing large checks to late-stage [...]

title: UNH uses AI to announce graduate names at commencement, drawing mixed reactions
description: UNH will use AI to read graduates' names at its May commencement for the second year running. The move has angered some students who say it contradicts the school's own rules discouraging AI use in coursework.

title: Air Combat Command activates new AI division to set policy and validate tools across its wings
description: Air Combat Command activated its new A3AI division on April 1 to oversee AI policy, tool validation, and training across the command. A weather data tool built with the 20th Fighter Wing cut over 85 hours of work to minutes.

title: Regina residents rally against proposed AI data centre before RM of Sherwood council vote
description: Nearly 200 people gathered at the legislature in Regina Saturday to protest the lack of consultation around Bell Canada's planned AI data centre, set to be built in Sherwood. The rural municipality's council is set to vote on the AI centre's development agreement on Monday.

title: Regina residents rally against proposed AI data centre before RM of Sherwood council vote - CBC
